title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama; chat, generate, embed, list models from Node or browsers.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client and asyncio bindings for Ollama; chat, generate, pull, push models.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain community integration to use Ollama models as LLM or chat endpoints in chains.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Open-source ChatGPT-style web UI for Ollama; manage models & conversations in browser.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Community-enhanced interactive CLI wrapper around ollama with REPL, history, syntax highlight.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Experimental GitHub Copilot-like code-completion service backed by Ollama models.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord bot that streams Ollama model responses into guild channels with slash commands.

title: ollama-nvim
summary: Neovim plugin to chat and generate code with local Ollama models inside the editor.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU & persistence support.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Unofficial Rust crate providing typed async client for Ollama HTTP API.

title: ollama-go
summary: Community-maintained Go SDK for Ollama; generate, chat, pull, list models.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack bot that answers questions using local Ollama models via socket mode.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin to run LLM prompts on notes and insert completions using Ollama.

title: ollama-datasets
summary: Curated datasets and fine-tune adapters compatible with Ollama’s GGUF format.

title: ollama-cookbook
summary: Community recipes for deploying, benchmarking, and chaining Ollama models in production.

title: ollama-model-registry
summary: Private model registry with UI to store, version, and serve GGUF models for Ollama.

title: ollama-chatbot-ui
summary: Minimal React chatbot frontend that streams responses from Ollama over SSE.

title: ollama-telegram
summary: Telegram bot using python-telegram-bot to chat with Ollama models privately or in groups.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration to use Ollama models as generators or embedders in pipelines.
